Suitable.\n- **Conclusion:** Safe, standard pattern.\n\n**Report 4:**\n- **Purpose:** Similar to previous, no malicious intent.\n- **Scores:** Malware = 0, Risk = 0.1, Obfuscated = 0.\n- **Analysis:** Slightly higher security risk score (0.1) possibly due to the nature of the code being autogenerated and exposing contract interaction.
